file: 1542_Li 等 - 2015 - Protonated titanate nanotubes as a highly active catalyst for the synthesis of renewable diesel and.txt

experiments.description: 使用质子化钛酸盐纳米管（PTNT）作为催化剂，在温和条件下（323K，4-8小时），催化2-甲基呋喃（2-MF）与正丁醛（n-butanal）的羟烷基化/烷基化反应，以高产率（77%）获得HAA产物5,5'-(丁烷-1,1-二基)双(2-甲基呋喃)。该实验还探索了PTNT催化2-MF与其他生物质羰基化合物（如糠醛、丙酮、异丙又丙酮）的反应。
experiments.text_snippet: The hydroxyalkylation/alkylation (HAA) of 2-methylfuran (2-MF) and n-butanal from lignocellulose... Over it, high yield of HAA product (77%) was achieved under mild reaction conditions. PTNT is also effective for the HAA (or alkylation) reactions between 2-MF and other lignocellulosic carbonyl compounds.

experiments.description: 将实验1中得到的HAA产物（1a）在固定床反应器中，使用沸石分子筛（H-ZSM-5, H-MOR, H-β）负载的镍催化剂（Ni/H-ZSM-5, Ni/H-MOR, Ni/H-β）上进行加氢脱氧（HDO）反应。反应条件为533K，6MPa氢气压力。目的是将含氧的HAA产物转化为可再生柴油和喷气燃料范围的支链烷烃。其中Ni/H-ZSM-5表现出最佳的催化性能和稳定性。
experiments.text_snippet: The HAA product of 2-MF and n-butanal was converted to diesel and jet fuel range branched alkanes by the hydrodeoxygenation (HDO) over zeolite loaded Ni catalysts. Among them, Ni/H-ZSM-5 demonstrated the best catalytic performance and good stability.

Reactant molar ratio.original: 2-MF to carbonyl compound = 2:1 (for n-butanal, furfural, acetone); 1:1 (for mesityl oxide)

Catalyst loading.original: 0.15 g per 40 mmol 2-MF and 20 mmol carbonyl compound

Catalyst stability.value: Slight deactivation observed upon recycling; attributed to pore blocking by polymeric molecules
Catalyst stability.original: Slight deactivation observed upon recycling; attributed to pore blocking by polymeric molecules

experiments.experiment_description: 使用质子化钛酸盐纳米管（PTNT）作为催化剂，在温和条件下（323K，4-8小时），催化2-甲基呋喃（2-MF）与正丁醛（n-butanal）的羟烷基化/烷基化反应，以高产率（77%）获得HAA产物5,5'-(丁烷-1,1-二基)双(2-甲基呋喃)。该实验还探索了PTNT催化2-MF与其他生物质羰基化合物（如糠醛、丙酮、异丙又丙酮）的反应。
experiments.text_snippet: The hydroxyalkylation/alkylation (HAA) of 2-methylfuran (2-MF) and n-butanal from lignocellulose... Over it, high yield of HAA product (77%) was achieved under mild reaction conditions. PTNT is also effective for the HAA (or alkylation) reactions between 2-MF and other lignocellulosic carbonyl compo...

Feedstock.original: HAA product (1a) from hydroxyalkylation/alkylation of 2-methylfuran and n-butanal

Product.value: Renewable diesel and jet fuel range branched alkanes
Product.original: Renewable diesel and jet fuel range branched alkanes

Product yield.original: 90% (carbon yield for Ni/H-ZSM-5), 79% (carbon yield for Ni/H-MOR)

Catalyst stability.original: Good stability (Ni/H-ZSM-5 demonstrated best catalytic performance and stability)

experiments.experiment_description: 将实验1中得到的HAA产物（1a）在固定床反应器中，使用沸石分子筛（H-ZSM-5, H-MOR, H-β）负载的镍催化剂（Ni/H-ZSM-5, Ni/H-MOR, Ni/H-β）上进行加氢脱氧（HDO）反应。反应条件为533K，6MPa氢气压力。目的是将含氧的HAA产物转化为可再生柴油和喷气燃料范围的支链烷烃。其中Ni/H-ZSM-5表现出最佳的催化性能和稳定性。
experiments.text_snippet: The HAA product of 2-MF and n-butanal was converted to diesel and jet fuel range branched alkanes by the hydrodeoxygenation (HDO) over zeolite loaded Ni catalysts. Among them, Ni/H-ZSM-5 demonstrated the best catalytic performance and good stability.
